childhood.familyBackground: Washington grew up in the Pacific Northwest in a family involved in construction and trade. His father was a skilled tradesman who influenced his work ethic.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 워싱턴은 건설 및 무역에 종사한 가족과 함께 태평양 북서부에서 성장했다.
childhood.earlyLife: Washington learned the construction trade and started his own company with minimal capital. He built a reputation for reliability and quality, growing his business exponentially.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 워싱턴은 건설 직종을 배웠고 최소 자본으로 자신의 회사를 설립했다.

careerTimeline.event: Founded Washington Construction Company with minimal capital
careerTimeline.eventKo: 최소 자본으로 워싱턴 건설 회사 설립

careerTimeline.event: Expanded into heavy equipment rental and mining operations
careerTimeline.eventKo: 중장비 임차 및 광업 사업으로 확장

careerTimeline.event: Achieved billionaire status through diversified construction and logistics
careerTimeline.eventKo: 다양한 건설 및 물류를 통해 억만장자 지위 달성

failures.description: Construction division suffered significant losses during housing market collapse
failures.descriptionKo: 건설 부문이 주택 시장 붕괴 중 상당한 손실을 입음
failures.lesson: Diversification across industries helps weather sector-specific downturns
failures.lessonKo: 산업 전반에 걸친 다각화는 부문별 침체를 견디는 데 도움이 된다

quotes.text: Build with integrity and the money follows

recommended.title: Built to Last
recommended.author: Jim Collins
recommended.note: Inspired his approach to building a lasting, diversified company
recommended.noteKo: 지속가능한 다각화 회사 구축에 대한 접근 방식을 영감을 줌

personalTraits.knownFor: Construction and logistics industry leadership; Pacific Northwest business dominance
personalTraits.knownForKo: 건설 및 물류 산업 리더십; 태평양 북서부 비즈니스 지배
personalTraits.philanthropy: Supports workforce development and construction education in the Pacific Northwest
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 태평양 북서부의 인력 개발 및 건설 교육 지원
